identifier_policy.reason: WO-M0-012 occurred in rolled-back unauthorized remediation history and is not reused.

work_orders.change_boundary: Read-only repository files, commits, workflow logs and artifacts plus local text and archive analysis. No repository, PR or workflow writes.
work_orders.test: Reconstruct tracked runtime scope, bind exact-head package content, inspect repository-only sources, execute neutral-filename negative control and recheck final PR head.
work_orders.negative_control: Dangerous content must produce identical findings under neutral and suggestive filenames; benign neutral-name content must produce zero findings.
work_orders.pass_criteria: All 195 tracked runtime/config paths content-bound; duplicate ownership decisions based on content; filename-independent control passes; limitations remain explicit.
work_orders.rollback_condition: Any missed tracked path, exact-head mismatch, unresolved shared content difference or filename-dependent control reopens the audit.
work_orders.residual_risk: Dynamic generated code, external systems, untracked local files and prior installations remain unverified.

work_orders.change_boundary: New immutable M0 successor evidence, manifest overlay/support pointer and PR #85 metadata only. No src, tools, workflows, product tests, main, merge, deployment or release.
work_orders.test: Candidate commit diff must contain only authorized paths; manifest-targeted tests and Foundation CI must pass before PR metadata update.
work_orders.negative_control: Branch ref must not move when candidate diff contains any unauthorized path or the PR head changes before fast-forward.
work_orders.pass_criteria: Immutable predecessors preserved; only superseding records added; R82 chain valid; exact-head tests pass; PR remains draft and release blocked.
work_orders.rollback_condition: Head mismatch, manifest chain failure, unauthorized diff, CI failure or claim elevation.
work_orders.residual_risk: M0 remains incomplete after reconciliation because Protocol v3.1 runtime, signed work orders and L4/L5 evidence are absent.
